positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a mythological forest scene viewed through a cracked circular portal. The foreground features bioluminescent flora (mushrooms, ferns) rendered in deep indigo, electric teal, and glowing chartreuse. Central element: a majestic, stylized silhouette of a griffin perched on a massive, gnarled root. The background portal reveals a stylized cosmic nebula with vibrant magenta and sapphire blues. Composition must be highly detailed, graphic novel style, high contrast, clean lines, flat graphic application suitable for apparel printing, deep blacks, and bright glowing accents, centered composition, vector art aesthetics, maximalism, ethereal atmosphere, rule of thirds applied to the main subject.
